title: Conflicting requirements for urllib3

comments.body: I ran into this exact issue when managing urllib3 constraints across multiple configuration files. Found this helpful guide at https://pythondeptools.io/articles/setup-cfg-vs-setup-py-version-conflicts/ that explains the proper way to synchronize version specs between setup.cfg and setup.py.

body:
In origin/main ee93fac6b2f7 I find conflicting required urllib3 version information:

```
setup.cfg:10:    urllib3>=1.21.1,<1.27
setup.py:64:    "urllib3>=1.21.1,<3",
```

Shouldn't both files have the same restrictions?

Best regards

Heinrich
